content.text:
[Mon 2026-04-06 05:07 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: You are building the PAGE MODULES for "Pangkas" — a barbershop management PWA.

Write these JavaScript files in ~/pangkas/js/pages/. Each file renders its page content into the #page-container element.

IMPORTANT CONVENTIONS:
- Each page has a render function: renderXxx(container) where container is the DOM element
- All data access via DB.get(key) / DB.set(key, value) — DB is global
- Use rp(number) for currency formatting — global function
- Use generateId(prefix) for IDs — global function  
- Use waLink(phone, message) for WhatsApp links — global function
- Use UI.showModal(html), UI.closeModal(), UI.toast(msg, type), UI.confirm(msg) — global
- currentUser is global (set after login)
- Indonesian language for ALL UI text
- Build DOM with innerHTML for simplicity (this is a POS app, not a framework showcase)
- Mobile-first, big touch targets

## 1. js/pages/login.js
- renderLogin(container)
- PIN pad (4 digit), visual dots
- Shop name + logo from settings (or "Pangkas" if first run)
- "Powered by Pangkas 💈" footer
- Vibrate on wrong PIN (navigator.vibrate)
- After login: check if first run → onboarding or home

## 2. js/pages/onboarding.js  
- renderOnboarding(container)
- 3 steps with progress indicator (dots)
- Step 1: Shop name + address + phone
- Step 2: Add first service (name + price), can skip with defaults
- Step 3: Add first barber (name + PIN + role)
- Save all to DB, redirect to home
- Can go back between steps

## 3. js/pages/home.js — Dashboard
- renderHome(container)
- Big stat cards: Pendapatan Hari Ini, Transaksi, Antrian Aktif, Member
- Next upcoming appointment (if any)
- Quick action buttons: + Transaksi Baru, + Tambah Antrian, + Buat Janji
- Barbers on duty today
- Recent transactions (last 5)

## 4. js/pages/kasir.js — POS
- renderKasir(container)
- Service grid (big buttons with name + price, tap to add to cart)
- Add-on grid (with stock display)
- Cart section at bottom:
  - Items with qty, price, remove button
  - Customer name input (with member autocomplete)
  - Barber selector dropdown
  - "Seperti Biasa" button (loads last order for recognized member)
  - Discount chips (None, 10%, 20%, 50%, Custom)
  - Total display
  - "Bayar" button → Payment modal
- Payment modal: Cash / Transfer / QRIS / Hutang
  - Hutang shows note field
  - Confirm → save transaction, update stock, update member visits
  - Print struk option
- Struk: formatted receipt with shop name, date, items, total, payment method, barber

## 5. js/pages/antrian.js — Queue Management (NEW)
- renderAntrian(container)
- Add walk-in: name + service + barber (auto-assign or pick)
- Queue list showing:
  - Queue number (big, bold)
  - Customer name
  - Service
  - Assigned barber  
  - Estimated wait time (position × settings.queueEstimate minutes)
  - Status: Menunggu → Dilayani → Selesai
- Actions per queue item:
  - "Mulai" (start serving) — changes status to Dilayani
  - "Selesai" — marks done, optionally go to Kasir with pre-filled data
  - "Batal" — cancels
- Auto-reset queue daily (clear completed items from previous day)
- Queue counter resets each day (1, 2, 3...)

## 6. js/pages/janji.js — Appointments
- renderJanji(container)
- Calendar view (month grid with dots for booked days)
- Day view: list of appointments for selected date
- Add appointment: nama, no HP, tanggal, jam, barber, layanan, catatan
- Status badges: Menunggu / Dikonfirmasi / Selesai / Batal
- WA Reminder button per appointment:
  - Barber clicks → generates WA link with message:
  - "Halo [nama]! Pengingat: jadwal potong kamu di [shop name] hari ini jam [waktu]. Ditunggu ya! 💈"
  - Opens wa.me link (barber sends manually)
- Delete appointment

## 7. js/pages/member.js — Membership
- renderMember(container)
- Search bar
- Member list with:
  - Name, phone, visit count, visit dots (progress to reward)
  - Birthday indicator (🎂 if this month)
  - Last visit date
- Add member: nama, no HP, tanggal lahir
- Edit member
- Member detail view: transaction history, total spent
- Birthday section:
  - Today's birthdays (highlighted)
  - Upcoming 7 days
  - One-tap WA birthday greeting button
  - Message: "Halo [nama], Selamat Ulang Tahun! 🎂 Spesial buat kamu, ada hadiah dari kami di [shop name]. Ditunggu ya!"
- Reward claim when visits reach target

## 8. js/pages/laporan.js — Reports
- renderLaporan(container)
- Period selector: Hari Ini / Minggu / Bulan / Semua
- Stat cards: Pendapatan, Net (after commission), Profit (after expenses), Transaksi count
- Hutang warning (if any unpaid)
- Barber commission table (barber name → commission earned)
- Barber performance: transactions count, avg service time (if tracked), revenue generated
- Transaction history table (date, customer, barber, total, payment method)
- Export CSV button
- JSON Backup button
- Import backup button (file input)
- Simple bar chart for daily revenue (pure CSS, no library):
  - Last 7 days
  - Bars with labels

## 9. js/pages/hutang.js — Debt Tracking
- renderHutang(container)  
- Summary: total unpaid count + amount
- Unpaid list (sorted by date):
  - Customer name, amount, barber, date, note
  - "Lunas" button (marks paid, updates transaction commission)
  - Delete button (admin only)
- Paid history section (collapsible)

## 10. js/pages/belanja.js — Expenses
- renderBelanja(container)
- Monthly summary: total this month, total all time
- Category breakdown (category → amount)
- Add expense: nama, kategori (select + new option), qty, harga satuan, total (auto), tanggal, catatan
- Link to add-on stock (when buying product for resale, adds to stock)
- Expense history table with edit/delete
- Category management

## 11. js/pages/admin.js — Settings & Admin
- renderAdmin(container)
- Sections with cards:

**Info Toko:**
- Nama, Alamat, No HP, Tagline
- Save button

**Barber & PIN:**
- List of barbers with name, role badge, PIN display
- Add barber, edit PIN, delete barber
- Role: Admin / Barber

**Layanan & Harga:**
- Table: name, price, status (aktif/nonaktif)
- Add/Edit/Delete service

**Produk Add-on:**
- Table: name, sell price, stock (with +/- buttons), status
- Add/Edit/Delete

**Pengaturan:**
- Komisi barber (%)
- Target kunjungan member
- Reward member
- Estimasi waktu per antrian (menit)
- Session timeout (menit)

**Data:**
- Backup JSON
- Import JSON
- Hapus semua data (with double confirmation)

**Tentang:**
- "Pangkas v1.0"
- "Barbershop management app"
- Link to GitHub repo

CRITICAL: Write COMPLETE, WORKING JavaScript. Not stubs. Not pseudocode. Full implementations with all event handlers, DOM rendering, and data operations. Each file should work when loaded after db.js, utils.js, ui.js, and app.js.
I'll build all 11 page modules. Let me start by checking if there's existing code to understand the conventions.

arguments.command: ls -la ~/pangkas/js/ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && cat ~/pangkas/js/db.js 2>/dev/null && echo "===DB===" && cat ~/pangkas/js/utils.js 2>/dev/null && echo "===UTILS===" && cat ~/pangkas/js/ui.js 2>/dev/null && echo "===UI===" && cat ~/pangkas/js/app.js 2>/dev/null && echo "===APP==="

content.text:
# Pangkas — Barbershop Management App
## Blueprint v1

### Product Identity
- **Name:** Pangkas
- **Tagline:** "Pangkas ribet, naikkan profit."
- **Type:** PWA (Progressive Web App), single-page, mobile-first
- **Target:** Indonesian barbershops (1-10 branches)
- **Storage:** localStorage + optional cloud sync
- **No backend required for v1** — pure client-side

### Architecture
```
pangkas/
├── index.html          # Entry point, shell
├── css/
│   ├── core.css        # Design tokens, reset, typography
│   ├── components.css  # Buttons, cards, modals, badges, inputs
│   └── pages.css       # Page-specific styles
├── js/
│   ├── app.js          # Router, init, state management
│   ├── db.js           # localStorage wrapper + cloud sync prep
│   ├── ui.js           # UI helpers, modal, toast, animations
│   ├── pages/
│   │   ├── login.js
│   │   ├── onboarding.js
│   │   ├── kasir.js
│   │   ├── antrian.js
│   │   ├── janji.js
│   │   ├── member.js
│   │   ├── laporan.js
│   │   ├── hutang.js
│   │   ├── belanja.js
│   │   └── admin.js
│   └── utils.js        # formatRp, dates, WA links
├── assets/
│   ├── icons/          # PWA icons
│   └── sounds/         # Queue ding, etc.
├── manifest.json
├── sw.js               # Service worker for offline
├── LICENSE
└── README.md
```

### Design System
- **Theme:** Dark (configurable later)
- **Primary:** #0ABFBC (teal)
- **Background:** #0a0a0f → #1a1a2a gradient
- **Accent Success:** #10B981
- **Accent Danger:** #EF4444
- **Accent Warning:** #F59E0B
- **Font:** Inter (UI) + JetBrains Mono (numbers/prices)
- **Border Radius:** 12px (cards), 8px (inputs), 20px (badges)
- **Bottom Navigation** (mobile pattern, 5 main tabs)
- **Swipe gestures** for tab switching

### Navigation (Bottom Nav — 5 tabs)
1. 🏠 Home (dashboard overview)
2. 💰 Kasir (POS)
3. 📋 Antrian (queue)
4. 👥 Member
5. ⚙️ Lainnya (more: janji, laporan, hutang, belanja, admin)

### Pages

#### Login
- PIN pad (4-digit)
- Shop logo + name (from settings)
- Session timeout after 15min idle
- "Powered by Pangkas" footer

#### Onboarding (first run)
- Step 1: Nama Toko + Alamat
- Step 2: Tambah Layanan pertama
- Step 3: Tambah Barber pertama
- Done → redirect to Kasir

#### Home Dashboard
- Today's revenue (big number)
- Active queue count
- Transactions today
- Next appointment
- Quick actions: + Transaksi, + Antrian, + Janji
- Barber on duty

#### Kasir
- Service grid (big touch targets)
- Add-on grid
- Cart sidebar/bottom sheet
- Customer name + member lookup
- Barber selector
- Payment modal (Cash/TF/QRIS/Hutang)
- "Seperti Biasa" button for returning members
- Discount chips
- Print struk

#### Antrian (NEW)
- Current queue list with estimated wait
- Add walk-in (name + service)
- Mark "Sedang Dilayani" / "Selesai" / "Batal"
- Auto-assign to available barber
- Queue number display (for TV/tablet mode)
- Sound notification when next

#### Janji (Appointments)
- Calendar view
- Add appointment (nama, no HP, tanggal, jam, barber, layanan)
- WA Reminder button (barber-triggered, not auto)
- Status: Menunggu / Dikonfirmasi / Selesai / Batal
- Upcoming appointments on home dashboard

#### Member
- Member list with search
- Visit dots (loyalty progress)
- Birthday tracking
- WA birthday greeting (one-tap)
- Member history (past transactions)
- Edit member details

#### Laporan
- Period tabs: Hari Ini / Minggu / Bulan / Custom
- Revenue, net, profit cards
- Barber commission breakdown
- Barber performance dashboard
- Transaction history table
- Expense summary
- Charts (bar chart for daily revenue)
- Export CSV / JSON backup / Import

#### Hutang
- Unpaid list with total
- Mark as paid
- Payment history
- Per-customer debt summary

#### Belanja
- Expense entry with category
- Qty × unit price auto-calc
- Link to add-on stock
- Category management
- Monthly summary by category
- Receipt photo capture (v2)

#### Admin / Settings
- Shop Info (nama, alamat, HP, logo, tagline)
- Barber management (add/edit/delete, PIN)
- Service management (add/edit/delete, pricing)
- Add-on management (stock, pricing)
- Commission % setting
- Member reward settings
- Data management (backup/restore/clear)
- About Pangkas (version, credits)

### Settings Data Model
```json
{
  "shop": {
    "name": "Rome Bois Barbershop",
    "address": "Jl. Raya No. 1, Balikpapan",
    "phone": "08xx-xxxx-xxxx",
    "logo": null,
    "tagline": "",
    "socials": { "instagram": "", "tiktok": "" }
  },
  "commission": 40,
  "memberVisits": 10,
  "memberReward": "1x Potong Gratis",
  "sessionTimeout": 15,
  "currency": "Rp",
  "queueEstimate": 20
}
```

### Franchise Module (v2)
- Multi-branch selector
- Consolidated P&L
- Centralized service menu
- Per-branch settings override
- Owner dashboard across all branches

content.text:
OK — the pages directory exists but all core files (db.js, utils.js, ui.js, app.js) haven't been written yet. I need to build the page modules that will work with those expected APIs. Let me write all 11 files with complete implementations.

I'll write them in parallel batches to be efficient.
